scene.description: A dramatic social media advertisement image for a food event

background.type: photograph of a long line of diverse excited people waiting at a food truck at night
background.lighting: warm street lights and neon glow, nighttime urban setting
background.overlay: dark gradient overlay from bottom (90% opacity) fading to top (30% opacity)

text_elements.style: red badge, white bold uppercase text, slightly rotated -3 degrees

text_elements.font_style: ultra bold condensed sans-serif like Bebas Neue

text_elements.style: large bold text with green (#16a34a) color
white text on green (#16a34a) rounded rectangle button

branding.overall_style: bold, urgent, street-smart, NOT corporate. Think food festival meets streetwear drop.
